threadDelete.title: Are you sure?
threadDelete.body: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the conversation {threadName} from our systems.

threadShare.title: Share Conversation
threadShare.disclaimer: Sharing creates a public, view-only link to this conversation. Make sure it contains no personal or sensitive information. You can switch Visibility back to private later. For more information, read our
threadShare.visibilityFailedDescription: Failed to make thread {threadId} {visibility}. Please try again.
